description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a walled yard featuring manicured lawns, trees, and a swimming pool. The structure is predominantly white with large windows and multiple entry points, including a prominent front door and several patio doors leading to the garden. The backyard includes a pool with a curved edge, a poolside seating area, and a section of vertical greenery along the rear wall. The landscaping is thoughtfully arranged, with clusters of trees and shrubs providing shade and privacy. The roof appears flat, with some sections possibly accessible as terraces. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with large windows, a flat roof, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool, trees, and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from the rear, highlighting the pool, poolside seating, and a row of trees along the back fence.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade with the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and landscaped greenery near the entryway.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the bungalow, revealing the pool, more trees, and the connection between the house and outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the opposite front angle, showing the main door, driveway, and additional garden elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and patio doors
